youtube.followersNote: Total subscribers is rounded by the YouTube connector; new followers use gained subscribers minus lost subscribers.

tiktok.postCountNote: Daily post counts use the TikTok Organic videos report. The Jul 10-12 video-level query timed out, so TikTok posts are not counted for that range instead of being guessed.
tiktok.topContentUnavailableReason: TikTok Organic profile totals are live through Jul 12, but Supermetrics video-level rows timed out for Jul 10-12. Post counts/top content are not shown for that range until the connector returns video rows.
